calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-26-2017 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned by Dept. 501 for Prove-Up Hearing.
Judge: Gail Dekreon, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Liana Ayrapetyan, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Mercy Housing California.
Zoya Verdiyan, Property Manager for Plaintiff Mercy Housing California, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defendant Monica Figueroa
Defendant filed her amended answer to plaintiff's complaint on December 4, 2017.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, December 26, 2017.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed & served on December 11, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Mercy Housing California, and against defendant Monica Figueroa, as follows:

Past-Due Rent - $2,712.00
Holdover Damages - $783.38.

Total - $3,495.38.

Plaintiff is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the property located at 1009 Howard Street, Unit 250, San Francisco, CA 94103.

The Rental Agreement is canceled and the Lease is forfeited.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

UD JURY TRIALS
Off Calendar Dec-26-2017 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-20-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Line # 9
Judge Pro Tem: Dennis Hyde, Clerk: A. Pascual, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Mercy Housing is NOT present.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Monica Figueroa is NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by PLAINTIFF OR defendant. Plaintiff's counsel informs the court that there may have been an issue regarding mail. The trial date of December 26, 2017 remains on calendar. (501)
